title: Paul F Taylor Cloudcuckoolander Work In Progress
description: Master of hilarity Paul F Taylor returns to Brighton Fringe, seemingly pulling hilarious misshapen nonsense from a bag of smashed ideas. Expect a joyous and imaginative hour packed with sharp one liners, delightful act outs and improvised nonsense. Then at the end Paul will get all serious about how difficult it is being this funny and you will all go home feeling deeply, or not, depends on how distracted he gets. As seen on Channel 4. ★★★★ Metro ★★★★ Beyond the Joke ★★★★ British Comedy Guide ★★★★ The List ★★★★ The Skinny ★★★★ The Wee Review ★★★★ Broadway Baby ★★★★ ShortCom
